case_title: YOUTH WITH A MISSION SF VS. KIMO UILA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 72542803) AS TO DEFENDANT UILA, KIMO UILA, TANYA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUTH WITH A MISSION SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UILA, KIMO UILA, TANYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1469 OAKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72558077)
